# Presentations

-   **Lecture 1: Intro and data structures**

![psy-400-1_introR](presentations/psy-400-1_introR.pdf){width="60%" height="400"}

     


-   **Lectures 2 & 3: Data wrangling**

![psy-400-2_data_wrangling](presentations/psy-400-2_data_wrangling.pdf){width="60%" height="400"}

     


-   **Lecture 4: Data visualization**

![psy-400-3_data_visualization](presentations/psy-400-3_data_visualization.pdf){width="60%" height="400"}
